stemHtml: Which option lists the contents of a distress message and in a correct order?

options.a: Nature of distress, aircraft call sign, present position, aerodrome of destination, assistance required.
options.b: Nature of distress, aircraft call sign, aerodrome of departure, position and level, pilot`s intention.
options.c: Aircraft call sign, route of flight, destination airport, nature of distress, level and heading.
options.d: Aircraft call sign, nature of distress, pilot`s intention, present position, level and heading.
